query:
WITH ensure_guild AS (SELECT ensure_guild($1))
			INSERT INTO guild_word_reaction (guild_id, word, content, media, emoji_id, guild_emoji)
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6)
            ON CONFLICT (guild_id)
            DO UPDATE SET content = $3, media = $4, emoji_id = $5, guild_emoji = $6
